overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt exploring the colorful medieval Renaissance city of Beauclair in Toussaint. The character walks through a red stone archway into a plaza, ascends to a garden overlook, then navigates winding cobblestone streets lined with vibrant historic buildings and NPCs.

events.description: exits red stone archway into sunlit town plaza with central fountain

agents.ego_description: walking through the stone archway into the town square

notable_agents.action: woman in dark dress walking toward the archway entrance

entered.detail: large red sandstone archway with heavy stone columns framing the entrance
open cobblestone square with central fountain and colorful Mediterranean-style buildings
bright yellow three-story building with wooden balconies and flower boxes
circular stone fountain with water basin in the center of the plaza

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a red stone archway, transitioning into a sunlit town plaza. Geralt walks forward as the space opens up to reveal a central fountain and colorful historic buildings surrounding the square.

events.description: begins ascending wide stone steps toward upper garden terrace
reaches upper terrace revealing scenic overlook of lake and distant forested hills

agents.ego_description: climbing stone stairs through a landscaped garden terrace with flowering plants and wooden pergola

entered.detail: wide worn stone steps leading upward to the terrace
wooden beam structure with climbing vines providing dappled shade
scenic vista of blue lake with rocky shoreline and distant green hills
large stone planters with blooming purple flowers

segments.scene_description: Geralt ascends stone stairs through a garden terrace shaded by a wooden pergola. The scene opens to a scenic overlook with views of a distant lake, framed by flowering planters and manicured hedges.

scene_state.functional_zone: garden overlook and return to plaza

events.description: turns around at overlook and begins descending stairs back toward plaza
briefly draws steel sword while walking through plaza then sheathes it

agents.ego_description: turning around and descending back through the garden, briefly drawing weapon in the plaza before continuing

notable_agents.action: townsman in blue tunic and brown vest walking up the street

entered.detail: tall ornate Gothic spire with pointed arches visible above the rooftops
wooden market stall with fabric awning displaying goods

segments.scene_description: Geralt turns around at the overlook and descends back toward the plaza. While walking through the square, he briefly draws his sword before sheathing it and continuing toward the main street, passing a bard and other townsfolk.

scene_state.functional_zone: main cobblestone street ascending through stone archway

events.description: enters main street ascending uphill through historic district with colorful facades
passes underneath large decorative stone archway connecting buildings overhead

agents.ego_description: walking up the steep cobblestone street through the town center, passing various NPCs and merchants

notable_agents.action: bard in green tunic playing lute while sitting on stone ledge
woman in green dress and headscarf ascending the street

entered.detail: ornate stone archway bridge connecting two buildings overhead with decorative carvings
vibrant red building with arched windows and stone trim
warm orange building with shuttered windows and climbing ivy

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks up the main cobblestone street ascending through the historic district. He passes underneath an ornate stone archway bridge while colorful Renaissance-style townhouses line both sides of the steep street.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding upper street with colorful Renaissance facades

events.description: enters narrower winding section of upper street with closely packed buildings

agents.ego_description: continuing ascent through the crowded upper street, navigating between merchants and townsfolk

notable_agents.action: merchant in purple and orange striped outfit walking downhill
woman in long dress with yellow hair ascending stairs

entered.detail: distinctive green building with ornate roof and decorative stonework
window boxes with vibrant red flowers on building facade
decorative stone railing with carved posts along building edge

segments.scene_description: The street narrows and winds upward through the upper town, with closely packed colorful buildings in green, orange, and red. Geralt continues ascending past merchants and townsfolk, with stone balustrades and flower boxes lining the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins in a sunlit town plaza and ascends through the vibrant, winding streets of a Renaissance city. It begins by passing through a red stone archway into an open square featuring a central fountain and colorful historic buildings. As the camera follows Geralt, the scene shifts upward through a shaded garden terrace and a wooden pergola, opening onto a scenic overlook with views of a distant lake. The perspective then turns back toward the plaza, moving past a bard and townsfolk before ascending a steep cobblestone street that passes under an ornate stone archway bridge. Finally, the path narrows and winds further upward into the upper town, where the environment becomes a dense corridor of green, orange, and red buildings lined with stone balustrades and flower boxes.
